mapper.content:
Hi {{326.`First Name`}}

Thank you for reaching out to us regarding the valuation of your property at {{192.q23_propertyName}}, {{192.q67_propertyAddress}}.

Our team will review your request and send a letter of engagement (LOE) ASAP.

We will contact you if we require any further information.

Thank you,

Chris Chornohos, AACI, MRICS
Principal, Director, Valuations & Advisory Services
+1 587-801-5151
chris.chornohos@avisonyoung.com | www.avisonyoung.com
4300, 525 - 8th Avenue SW, Calgary, AB T2P 1G1
mapper.subject: Your Property Valuation Request

custom_fields.fa3d6c46-9d13-4025-9a2c-15414fc4e748:
Hi {{192.q4_clientFull.first}}, Thank you for reaching out to us regarding the valuation of your property at {{192.q67_propertyAddress}}. Our team will review your details and get back to you within the next day with any questions and what you can expect the next steps to be. 

Please share any further information that might come up in the meantime, and know you can call me directly at any time.
